title: Remember this too: when I talk to JARVIS I want it to keep the thread go

memory_signals.summary: Chris wants it to keep the thread going naturally like chatgpt instead of acting like every turn is a fresh command

latest_user_text: Remember this too: when I talk to JARVIS I want it to keep the thread going naturally like ChatGPT instead of acting like every turn is a fresh command.
latest_assistant_text: Sir, JARVIS hit an AI-service problem while handling the executive work request. Reason: Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': "The requested model, 'gpt-realtime-1.5' was not found.", 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'param': 'model', 'code': 'model_not_found'}}. turns.text: Remember this too: when I talk to JARVIS I want it to keep the thread going naturally like ChatGPT instead of acting like every turn is a fresh command.

Sir, JARVIS hit an AI-service problem while handling the executive work request. Reason: Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': "The requested model, 'gpt-realtime-1.5' was not found.", 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'param': 'model', 'code': 'model_not_found'}}. Manual fallback is in effect: keep the scope tight, avoid external actions, and stage the next concrete step for review.
